headline: Mizuho Lifts Coterra (CTRA) Target on Higher Oil Price Forecast
summary: Coterra Energy Inc. (NYSE:CTRA) is included among the 14 High Growth Dividend Paying Stocks to Invest in Now. On March 17, Mizuho raised the firm’s price recommendation on Coterra Energy Inc. (NYSE:CTRA) to $43 from $36. It kept an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm increased its 2026 oil price outlook by 14% to […]
